preReview.title: Nashville SC v Houston Dynamo: Brugman determined to learn from back-to-back road defeats
preReview.description: Having lost each of their last three games, Nashville SC will look to return to winning ways when they host the Houston Dynamo.

preReview.title: Nashville SC vs Houston Dynamo: Brugman decidido a aprender de las derrotas consecutivas fuera de casa
preReview.description: Habiendo perdido sus últimos tres partidos, Nashville SC buscará volver al camino de la victoria cuando reciban al Houston Dynamo.

preReview.title: Nashville SC x Houston Dynamo: Brugman determinado a aprender com derrotas consecutivas fora de casa
preReview.description: Tendo perdido cada um dos últimos três jogos, o Nashville SC buscará voltar ao caminho das vitórias ao receber o Houston Dynamo.

preReview.title: Nashville SC contro Houston Dynamo: Brugman determinato a imparare dalle sconfitte in trasferta
preReview.description: Avendo perso ciascuna delle ultime tre partite, il Nashville SC cercherà di tornare alla vittoria quando ospiterà gli Houston Dynamo.

preReview.title: Nashville SC contre Houston Dynamo : Brugman déterminé à tirer les leçons des défaites consécutives à l'extérieur
preReview.description: Après avoir perdu chacun de leurs trois derniers matchs, Nashville SC cherchera à retrouver le chemin de la victoire en accueillant le Houston Dynamo.

preReview.title: Nashville SC gegen Houston Dynamo: Brugman entschlossen, aus den Auswärtsniederlagen zu lernen
preReview.description: Nach drei Niederlagen in Folge will Nashville SC gegen die Houston Dynamo wieder auf die Siegerstraße zurückkehren.

preReview.title: ناشفيل SC ضد هيوستن دينامو: بروغمان مصمم على الاستفادة من الخسائر المتتالية خارج الديار
preReview.description: بعد خسارتهم في آخر ثلاث مباريات، سيتطلع ناشفيل SC للعودة إلى طريق الانتصارات عندما يستضيفون هيوستن دينامو.

preReview.title: Nashville SC x Houston Dynamo: Brugman determinado a aprender com derrotas consecutivas fora de casa
preReview.description: Depois de perder os últimos três jogos, o Nashville SC vai em busca de voltar a vencer ao receber o Houston Dynamo.

QAData.question: Who won between Nashville SC and Houston Dynamo FC on Sun, 28 Sep 2025 00:30:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: Nashville SC won 3–1 over Houston Dynamo FC on Sun, 28 Sep 2025 00:30:00 GMT.
